result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  confix [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|detailed|Diagnostic|diagnostic|Minimal|minimal|Normal|normal|Quiet|quiet>  Sets the verbosity level [default: Normal]
  --version                                                                                            Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                       Show help and usage information

Commands:
  component                        This command is used to manage components.
  project                          This command is used to manage projects.
  solution                         This command is used to manage solutions.
  variable                         This command is used to manage variables.
  build
  restore
  validate                         Validates the schema of all the projects
  encrypt <input-file> <out-file>  Encrypts a file using the configured provider
  decrypt <input-file> <out-file>  Decrypts a file using the configured provider
  config                           This command is used to manage config.

commands.payload:

  --version                                                                                            Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                       Show help and usage information

Commands:
  component                        This command is used to manage components.
  project                          This command is used to manage projects.
  solution                         This command is used to manage solutions.
  variable                         This command is used to manage variables.
  build
  restore
  validate                         Validates the schema of all the projects
  encrypt <input-file> <out-file>  Encrypts a file using the configured provider
  decrypt <input-file> <out-file>  Decrypts a file using the configured provider
  config                           This command is used to manage config.

result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  confix build [options]

Options:
  --env, --environment <environment>                                                                   The name of the environment to run the command in. Overrules the active environment set in .confixrc
  -o, --output-file <output-file>                                                                      Specifies the output file
  --encrypt                                                                                            Encrypt the output file
  --git-username <git-username>                                                                        The username used for git authentication.
  --git-token <git-token>                                                                              The token used for git authentication.
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|detailed|Diagnostic|diagnostic|Minimal|minimal|Normal|normal|Quiet|quiet>  Sets the verbosity level [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                       Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  This command is used to manage components.

Usage:
  confix component [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|detailed|Diagnostic|diagnostic|Minimal|minimal|Normal|normal|Quiet|quiet>  Sets the verbosity level [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                       Show help and usage information

Commands:
  build        builds a component. Runs all configured component inputs
  init <name>  Initializes a component and creates a component file
  list         Lists the component of the project
  add <name>   Adds a component to the project

commands.payload:

Commands:
  build        builds a component. Runs all configured component inputs
  init <name>  Initializes a component and creates a component file
  list         Lists the component of the project
  add <name>   Adds a component to the project

result.stdout:
Description:
  Lists the component of the project

Usage:
  confix component list [options]

Options:
  -f, --format <Json|json>                                                                             Sets the output format
  -o, --output-file <output-file>                                                                      Specifies the output file
  --env, --environment <environment>                                                                   The name of the environment to run the command in. Overrules the active environment set in .confixrc
  --only-components                                                                                    If you specify this option, only the components will be built.
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|detailed|Diagnostic|diagnostic|Minimal|minimal|Normal|normal|Quiet|quiet>  Sets the verbosity level [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                       Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  This command is used to manage config.

Usage:
  confix config [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|detailed|Diagnostic|diagnostic|Minimal|minimal|Normal|normal|Quiet|quiet>  Sets the verbosity level [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                       Show help and usage information

Commands:
  show                Shows the configuration to a file
  set <path> <value>  Sets a configuration value in the nearest .confixrc
  list                Lists the configuration to a file

result.stdout:
Description:
  Decrypts a file using the configured provider

Usage:
  confix decrypt [<input-file> [<out-file>]] [options]

Arguments:
  <input-file>  The path to the file to encrypt or decrypt.
  <out-file>    The file to write the encrypted or decrypted data to. 
                If not provided the input file will be overwritten. 
                Existing files will be overwritten.

Options:
  --env, --environment <environment>                                                                   The name of the environment to run the command in. Overrules the active environment set in .confixrc
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|detailed|Diagnostic|diagnostic|Minimal|minimal|Normal|normal|Quiet|quiet>  Sets the verbosity level [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                       Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  This command is used to manage projects.

Usage:
  confix project [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|detailed|Diagnostic|diagnostic|Minimal|minimal|Normal|normal|Quiet|quiet>  Sets the verbosity level [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                       Show help and usage information

Commands:
  restore   Reloads the schema of a project
  build     Replaces all variables in the project files with their values
  init      Initializes a project and creates a project file
  validate  Validates the configuration files of a project
  report    Generates a report for the project

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  confix project [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|detailed|Diagnostic|diagnostic|Minimal|minimal|Normal|normal|Quiet|quiet>  Sets the verbosity level [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                       Show help and usage information

Commands:
  restore   Reloads the schema of a project
  build     Replaces all variables in the project files with their values
  init      Initializes a project and creates a project file
  validate  Validates the configuration files of a project
  report    Generates a report for the project

result.stdout:
Description:
  Replaces all variables in the project files with their values

Usage:
  confix project build [options]

Options:
  --no-restore                                                                                         Disables restoring of schemas [default: False]
  --git-username <git-username>                                                                        The username used for git authentication.
  --git-token <git-token>                                                                              The token used for git authentication.
  -o, --output-file <output-file>                                                                      Specifies the output file
  --env, --environment <environment>                                                                   The name of the environment to run the command in. Overrules the active environment set in .confixrc
  --only-components                                                                                    If you specify this option, only the components will be built.
  --encrypt                                                                                            Encrypt the output file
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|detailed|Diagnostic|diagnostic|Minimal|minimal|Normal|normal|Quiet|quiet>  Sets the verbosity level [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                       Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generates a report for the project

Usage:
  confix project report [options]

Options:
  --no-restore                                                                                         Disables restoring of schemas [default: False]
  --env, --environment <environment>                                                                   The name of the environment to run the command in. Overrules the active environment set in .confixrc
  -o, --output-file <output-file>                                                                      The path to the report file. If not specified, the report will be written to the console.
  --only-components                                                                                    If you specify this option, only the components will be built.
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|detailed|Diagnostic|diagnostic|Minimal|minimal|Normal|normal|Quiet|quiet>  Sets the verbosity level [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                       Show help and usage information

  -o, --output-file <output-file>                                                                      The path to the report file. If not specified, the report will be written to the console.
  --only-components                                                                                    If you specify this option, only the components will be built.
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|detailed|Diagnostic|diagnostic|Minimal|minimal|Normal|normal|Quiet|quiet>  Sets the verbosity level [default: Normal]

result.stdout:
Description:
  This command is used to manage solutions.

Usage:
  confix solution [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|detailed|Diagnostic|diagnostic|Minimal|minimal|Normal|normal|Quiet|quiet>  Sets the verbosity level [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                       Show help and usage information

Commands:
  restore   Reloads the schema of all the projects in the solution
  build     Replaces all variables in the solution files with their values
  init      Initializes a solution and creates a solution file
  validate  Validates the schema of all the projects in the solution

result.stdout:
Description:
  This command is used to manage variables.

Usage:
  confix variable [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|detailed|Diagnostic|diagnostic|Minimal|minimal|Normal|normal|Quiet|quiet>  Sets the verbosity level [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                       Show help and usage information

Commands:
  get   resolves a variable by name
  set   sets a variable. Overrides existing value if any.
  list  list available variables
  copy  Copies a variable from one provider to another provider

commands.payload:
Description:
  This command is used to manage variables.

Usage:
  confix variable [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|detailed|Diagnostic|diagnostic|Minimal|minimal|Normal|normal|Quiet|quiet>  Sets the verbosity level [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                       Show help and usage information

Commands:
  get   resolves a variable by name
  set   sets a variable. Overrides existing value if any.
  list  list available variables
  copy  Copies a variable from one provider to another provider

result.stdout:
Description:
  Copies a variable from one provider to another provider

Usage:
  confix variable copy [options]

Options:
  --env, --environment <environment>                                                                   The name of the environment to run the command in. Overrules the active environment set in .confixrc
  --from <from>                                                                                        The name of the new variable
  --to <to>                                                                                            The name of the new variable
  --to-environment <to-environment>                                                                    The name of the environment you want to migrate the variable to
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|detailed|Diagnostic|diagnostic|Minimal|minimal|Normal|normal|Quiet|quiet>  Sets the verbosity level [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                       Show help and usage information

  -?, -h, --help                                                                                       Show help and usage information
